title: FLOSS Weekly 344: OSCON Preview
summary:
This week Aaron and Guillermo talk with Rachel Roumeliotis about The O'Reilly Open Source Convention (OSCON). OSCON is an annual convention for free and open source software.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
